description: Current actionable recommendations. Generated each session based on signals, predictions, and market forecasts. Accuracy is tracked to build confidence over time.

market_regime.label: DE-ESCALATION_REAL_STABLE
market_regime.dominant_risk: April 10 Islamabad talks (10 AM IST) — both US and Iran confirmed participation. Outcome tomorrow is regime-defining. TALKS_FAIL = WAR_PREMIUM_RETURN and Nifty -2-4%.
market_regime.key_risk: Islamabad talks April 10 outcome + TCS Q4FY26 post-market results today (IT direction pivot).
market_regime.regime_note: Day 2 of ceasefire — regime unchanged from April 8. Nifty opened cautiously at ~23,856 after +3.78% rally (base case consolidation playing out). GIFT Nifty slightly in red at pre-open. Brent at ~$93.76 — stable in $90-97 de-escalation zone. TCS Q4FY26 results expected post-market today (~3:40-4:20 PM IST): estimates are Revenue ₹69,932 cr (+8% YoY), PAT ₹13,919 cr (+14% YoY), EBIT ~25.3-25.4%. Islamabad talks confirmed April 10 — both US and Iran have confirmed participation, Pakistan hosting. No breakdowns or surprise headlines overnight. Regime STABLE.

actions.instruction: WATCH — LOW urgency. SWIGGY at ~₹281.45 (April 8 close). A001 sell window (₹278-285) remains valid. Any session strength to ₹280-285 is a partial sell opportunity. No stock-specific catalyst until Q4 results (May 8). Regime is risk-on (ceasefire) which caps downside for now. If April 10 Islamabad talks fail → Swiggy could see modest selloff as market goes risk-off. P001 bearish thesis (₹260 breach by April 25) remains open but weakened — confidence 2.
actions.rationale_short: P001 target (₹260) requires -7.7% fall from ₹281. Ceasefire headwind to bearish thesis. Sell window ₹278-285 still valid intraday.
actions.confidence_basis: Ceasefire reduces bearish conviction. ₹260 remains structural risk but timing is compressed to 16 days. Confidence maintained at 2.

signal_details.T001: ₹260 52-week support — SWIGGY needs -7.7% to breach. Ceasefire gives partial relief.
signal_details.M003: FII April 8 provisional flows positive on ceasefire. Reduces immediate selling pressure.

actions.pnl_impact_if_wrong: If SWIGGY rallies to ₹295+ on market continuation, missed upside

actions.instruction: EXIT TRIGGER REMAINS ACTIVE. SETFGOLD at ~₹128.21 (April 9 morning — gold holding slightly elevated vs April 8 close of ₹125.59). Conditions still met: (1) Ceasefire confirmed ✓ (2) Hormuz safe passage ✓. SELL 50-75% of SETFGOLD position TODAY if you haven't already. Note: gold is slightly elevated today (~₹128) possibly on pre-April 10 talks risk hedging. This is YOUR window — the premium compression will accelerate if April 10 talks show progress. RETAIN 25-30% as hedge for April 10 binary. P020 target: ₹120-122 within 7 days. Do NOT wait for Monday — exit before April 10 to lock in the war premium.

scenarios.above_100: REGIME CONCERN — war premium returning? Re-evaluate A002 (INDIGO) and A007 (MRPL GRM thesis)
scenarios.95_to_100: WATCH ZONE — Brent stabilization. MRPL thesis tracking. No action.
scenarios.90_to_95: CURRENT ZONE — De-escalation confirmed. MRPL recovery (P017) strong.

market_actions.instruction: HIGHEST PRIORITY EVENT: April 10 Islamabad talks (10:00 AM IST + 12:30 PM IST sessions). BOTH US AND IRAN CONFIRMED PARTICIPATION. Pakistan hosting. This is the NEXT regime-defining binary. Morning brief April 10 must lead with this outcome BEFORE all else. Three outcomes: (1) Talks progress = DE-ESCALATION_DEEPENING, ceasefire extends to 4+ weeks. (2) Talks neutral/delayed = DE-ESCALATION_REAL holds, 2-week ceasefire timeline intact. (3) Talks fail = WAR_PREMIUM_RETURN, re-activate A002 INDIGO sell trigger.
market_actions.current_level: Confirmed — Both parties attending. April 10 10:00 AM IST.

scenarios.talks_progress: BULLISH — Extend all positions. Accelerate SETFGOLD exit. Defense premium compresses. P019 ADANI PORT strengthens.
scenarios.talks_neutral: SIDEWAYS — Hold positions. 2-week ceasefire timeline intact. Review April 22 (ceasefire expiry).
scenarios.talks_fail: BEARISH — WAR_PREMIUM returns. Re-activate A002 (INDIGO SELL). Hold all SETFGOLD. ASTRA MICRO new high potential. Nifty -2-4%.

Conference call 7:00 PM IST. P018 predicts TCS above ₹2,600 within 7 days — results today will largely determine direction. CHECK RESULTS TONIGHT AND SCORE P018 IN EOD WRAP.
